faqVideo.subtitle: Common questions about business video production: process, timelines, deliverables and usage.

items.question: What’s included in a corporate video production service?
items.answer: Typically: planning and scripting (if needed), pre-production, filming, editing, music and basic motion graphics, color, and exports optimized for web and social. The exact scope depends on your goals.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: It depends on the format and volume of material, but we usually deliver a first cut within a few business days after filming. Final timelines are agreed before we start.

items.question: Do you handle script, creative direction and storytelling?
items.answer: Yes. We can support you from concept to execution: message structure, script, visual style, direction and editing pace so the video delivers results.

items.question: Do you film outside the Costa del Sol?
items.answer: Yes. We work on the Costa del Sol, Madrid, and can travel to other areas depending on the project.

items.question: Can I use the footage for social and ads?
items.answer: Yes. We can deliver optimized versions (vertical, square or horizontal) per channel, and create cutdowns for campaigns and social media.

faqPhotography.subtitle: Common questions about professional photography for businesses: planning, delivery and usage.

items.question: What types of business photography do you offer?
items.answer: Corporate, events, product, food, real estate/interiors, and social content. We adapt the style to your industry and marketing goals.

items.question: How do we plan a photo shoot?
items.answer: We define objectives, visual style, references, location, a shot list and timing. For product/food, we also coordinate styling and preparation to keep everything consistent.

items.question: When will I receive the photos and in which format?
items.answer: We deliver an edited selection via download link, with versions optimized for web/social/print. Timelines depend on volume and are agreed before the shoot.

items.question: Is editing and retouching included?
items.answer: Yes. We include color/exposure adjustments and professional retouching for a premium, natural finish aligned with your brand.

items.question: Can you create social media assets from the shoot?
items.answer: Yes. We can plan for Instagram/LinkedIn/TikTok formats and deliver crops/variants ready for posting and campaigns.
